prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年安徽大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约10852名、11244名、12247名、11548名，整体在10800–12200区间波动，近两年呈先降后升态势，202 4年基准约11548名。；该校在北京市招生计划2021–2024年均为6人（含计算机类/计算机科学与技术、经济学类/金融学两个专 业）；2026年计划大幅缩减至2人，仅保留金融学（不限选科）一个专业，缩招幅度约67%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科 中国大学排名近年约第90–101位（2021年第90→2026年第101），整体排名略有下滑但仍属全国百强；2023年高考周期内该校曾因师德师风事件获偏负面评价，但 2026年声誉文件中无该校条目，近期无明显重大舆情；抖音热度排名第84位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，报考关注度不高；作为综合性大学，其在计算机、经济管理等方向有一定学科基础。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生 仅金融学专业，属经济学大类；近年财经类专业社会热度整体平稳偏降温。北京市考生总数持续增长：2021年42037→2022年44958→2023年55201→2024年55936→2025年65434→2026年 84900，增幅约29.7%，竞争压力明显加大。，波动不大；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，属跨省招生；该校在北京市招生占比极小（近年约0.1%–0.3%），地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年基准位次约115 48名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减至2人（缩招约67%）、北京市考生总数大幅增长约29.7%三重因素，竞争显著加剧，预计2026年最低录取位次将明显前移。经，预测2026年最低位次约6879名，区间6379–7379名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum admission rankings for Anhui University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 10852, 11244, 12247, and 11548, fluctuating within the 10800–12200 range, with a recent trend of first decreasing then increasing, and a baseline of about 11548 in 2024. The enrollment plan in Beijing was 6 students each year from 2021 to 2024 (including Computer/Computer Science and Technology, Economics/Finance majors); in 2026, the plan is significantly reduced to 2 students, retaining only Finance (no subject restrictions), a reduction of about 67%, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science China University ranking has been around 90–101 in recent years (90th in 2021 to 101st in 2026), showing a slight decline but still within the national top 100; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, the university received negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident, but there is no entry for the university in the 2026 reputation file, indicating no recent major public opinion incidents; its Douyin popularity ranks 84th (rated 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, indicating low application attention; as a comprehensive university, it has a certain disciplinary foundation in computer science, economics, and management.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, only the Finance major is offered, belonging to the economics category; the social popularity of finance majors has been generally stable with a cooling trend in recent years. The total number of Beijing examinees has been increasing: 42037 in 2021, 44958 in 2022, 55201 in 2023, 55936 in 2024, 65434 in 2025, and 84900 in 2026, an increase of about 29.7%, significantly intensifying competition. Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; its enrollment proportion in Beijing is very small (about 0.1%–0.3% in recent years), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2024 baseline ranking of about 11548, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan to 2 students (a reduction of about 67%), and the substantial increase in Beijing examinees by about 29.7%, competition is significantly intensified, and the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move forward noticeably. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 6879, with a range of 6379–7379.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Anhui University only offers Finance (no subject restrictions) with 2 students in Beijing, a very small enrollment scale. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 6379–7379 can consider applying; those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<6379) have a higher admission probability, while those near the lower limit (>7379) face greater risk. It is recommended to combine with other university choices for a reasonable portfolio.
